glosses.vi: đồ ăn vặt; quán ăn vặt

sentences.target: Ich hole mir Pommes beim Imbiss.

translations.de: Ich hole mir Pommes beim Imbiss.
translations.en: I’m getting fries at the snack stand.
translations.es: Voy a comprar papas fritas en el puesto de comida.
translations.fr: Je prends des frites au kiosque.
translations.ko: 간이 매점에서 감자튀김 사 먹을 거야.
translations.ru: Я возьму картошку фри в ларьке.
translations.pt: Vou pegar batata frita no quiosque.
translations.vi: Tôi đang mua khoai tây chiên ở quầy đồ ăn.
translations.nl: Ik haal friet bij de snackbar.
translations.uk: Я беру картоплю фрі в кіоску.
translations.hi: मैं स्टॉल से फ्राइज़ ले रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Biorę frytki w budce z jedzeniem.
translations.el: Παίρνω πατάτες τηγανητές από την καντίνα.
translations.nb: Jeg henter pommes frites i kiosken.
translations.id: Aku lagi beli kentang goreng di warung.
translations.ro: Îmi iau cartofi prăjiți de la chioșc.
translations.cs: Beru si hranolky u stánku s občerstvením.
translations.ja: 売店でフライドポテトを買うよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense 1st person singular; denotes the action ‘to fetch/get’.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular dative; benefactive/indirect object indicating the recipient of the action.
Common noun, plural (collective); direct object (accusative) meaning French fries.
Preposition ‘bei’ contracted with the article ‘dem’; governs dative and introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition ‘bei’ (dative); refers to a snack stand/bar.

sentences.target: Der Imbiss an der Ecke macht zu.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈɪmbɪs an deːɐ̯ ˈɛkə maxt tsuː/

translations.de: Der Imbiss an der Ecke macht zu.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈɪmbɪs an deːɐ̯ ˈɛkə maxt tsuː/
translations.en: The snack stand on the corner is closing.
translations.es: El puesto de comida de la esquina está cerrando.
translations.ko: 모퉁이에 있는 간이 매점이 문 닫고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 拐角的小吃摊要关门了。
translations.yue: 街角嗰間小食檔就嚟收檔。
translations.pt: O quiosque da esquina está fechando.
translations.vi: Quầy đồ ăn ở góc đường đang đóng cửa.
translations.nl: De snackbar op de hoek gaat dicht.
translations.hi: कोने वाला स्टॉल बंद हो रहा है.
translations.id: Warung di pojok sebentar lagi tutup.
translations.sv: Gatuköket på hörnet håller på va stänga.
translations.ro: Chioșcul de la colț se închide.
translations.ja: 角の売店がもうすぐ閉まる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun, masculine; subject of the clause.
Preposition; governs dative and introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner of ‘Ecke’ within the PP.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition ‘an’ (dative).
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; here used with a separated particle to form the separable verb ‘zumachen’ (to close).
Verbal particle completing the separable verb ‘zumachen’ (to close).

sentences.target: Wir essen einen schnellen Imbiss vor dem Kino.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈɛsən ˈaɪ̯nən ˈʃnɛlən ˈɪmbɪs foːɐ̯ deːm ˈkiːno/

translations.de: Wir essen einen schnellen Imbiss vor dem Kino.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈɛsən ˈaɪ̯nən ˈʃnɛlən ˈɪmbɪs foːɐ̯ deːm ˈkiːno/
translations.en: We’re having a quick snack before the movie.
translations.es: Vamos a comer algo rápido antes de la película.
translations.fr: On prend un petit encas avant le film.
translations.it: Facciamo uno spuntino veloce prima del film.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在看电影前随便吃点东西。
translations.yue: 我哋睇戲之前快快手食啲嘢。
translations.pt: Vamos comer um lanche rápido antes do filme.
translations.he: אנחנו אוכלים משהו קטן לפני הסרט.
translations.tr: Filmden önce hızlıca bir şeyler atıştırıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi ăn nhẹ nhanh trước khi xem phim.
translations.ar: نأكل وجبة خفيفة سريعة قبل الفيلم.
translations.nl: We eten snel even een hapje γia de film.
translations.hu: Gyorsan bekapunk valamit a film előtt.
translations.hi: हम फिल्म से पहले जल्दी कुछ खा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Τρώμε κάτι γρήγορο πριν την ταινία.
translations.nb: Vi tar en kjapp matbit før filmen.
translations.id: Kita ăn camilan cepat πpiv nonton film.
translations.sv: Vi tar ett snabbt mellanmål före filmen.
translations.ro: Mâncăm ceva rapid înainte de film.
translations.cs: Dáme si rychlou svačinu před filmem.
translations.da: Vi tager en hurtig bid mad før filmen.
translations.ja: 映画の前に軽く食べていく。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense 1st person plural; denotes the action ‘to eat’.
Indefinite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of the direct object noun.
Inflected adjective, accusative masculine singular; attributive modifier of ‘Imbiss’.
Common noun, masculine; direct object (accusative); here denotes a light meal/snack.
Preposition; governs dative and introduces a temporal (or locative) prepositional phrase.
Definite article, dative neuter singular; determiner of ‘Kino’ within the PP.
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition ‘vor’ (dative).

sentences.target: Neben dem Bahnhof steht ein neuer Imbiss.
sentences.reading: /ˈneːbən deːm ˈbaːnhoːf ʃteːt aɪ̯n ˈnɔɪ̯ɐ ˈɪmbɪs/

translations.de: Neben dem Bahnhof steht ein neuer Imbiss.
translations.ipa: /ˈneːbən deːm ˈbaːnhoːf ʃteːt aɪ̯n ˈnɔɪ̯ɐ ˈɪmbɪs/
translations.en: There’s a new snack stand next to the station.
translations.es: Hay un puesto de comida nuevo al lado de la estación.
translations.fr: Il y a un nouveau stand à côté de la gare.
translations.it: C'è un chiosco nuovo accanto alla stazione.
translations.zh-Hans: 车站旁边新开了一个小吃摊。
translations.yue: 火車站旁邊開咗間新嘅小食檔。
translations.pt: Tem um quiosque novo ao lado da estação.
translations.tr: İstasyonun yanında yeni bir büfe var.
translations.vi: Bên cạnh ga có một quầy đồ ăn mới.
translations.nl: Er staat een nieuwe snackbar naast het station.
translations.uk: Поряд зі станцією з’явився новий кіоск.
translations.hu: Az állomás mellett nyílt egy új büfé.
translations.hi: स्टेशन के पास एक नया स्टॉल है.
translations.pl: Obok dworca jest nowa budka z jedzeniem.
translations.el: Δίπλα στον σταθμό υπάρχει μια καινούρια καντίνα.
translations.nb: Det er en ny kiosk ved stasjonen.
translations.id: Di sebelah stasiun ada warung baru.
translations.sv: Det finns ett nytt gatukök bredvid stationen.
translations.ro: Lângă gară este un chioșc nou.
translations.cs: Vedle nádraží je nový stánek s občerstvením.
translations.da: Der er en ny grillbar ved stationen.
translations.ja: 駅のそばに新しい売店がある。

tokens.explanation: Preposition; governs dative and introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; determiner of ‘Bahnhof’ within the PP.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition ‘Neben’ (dative).
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; denotes position/existence (‘stands’).
Indefinite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Inflected adjective, nominative masculine singular; attributive modifier of ‘Imbiss’.
Common noun, masculine; subject of the clause.
